name: example-admin-finance-terminal
title: Finance Terminal Admin
description: Bloomberg-Terminal-style institutional admin: pure-black canvas, amber accents, dense monospace data tables, multi-panel grid for scanning 50+ data points without scrolling. Use for trading desks, treasury, risk, ops control rooms.

query.en: Give me a Bloomberg-Terminal-style admin for a treasury desk — black background, amber accents, monospace, dense tables, ticker, P&L panel, risk gauges.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Give me a Bloomberg-Terminal-style admin for a treasury desk — black background, amber accents, monospace, dense tables, ticker, P&L panel, risk gauges.
